title: tdd Input Schema
description: Input contract for Canon TDD execution

task.description: Concise statement of behavior or bug to implement/fix.

mode.description: single_cycle runs one RED->GREEN loop; full_task runs backlog to completion.

scenarioBacklog.description: Ordered list of scenarios to drive test-first development.

repairBudget.description: Maximum repair attempts for a single scenario before redesign/escalation.

testCommand.description: Project-specific test command for the current scope.

enableMemoryProfile.description: Use bounded tdd-memory-profile hints for commands and recurring failures.
